---
title: "Margaret Julia Argles"
---

## Margaret Julia Argles

**Dates:** (1816/7-1898)

**Maiden name:** (Davys)

### Description

lifelong friend of CMY

### Biography

Known as Julia, daughter of the Rt. Rev. George Davys (1780–1864), Bishop of Peterborough, she married (24 October 1839) the Very Rev. Marsham Argles (1814-1892). Her large family included Edith Argles, Marsham Argles, Alice Rawnsley and Agnes (\'Dolly\') Thicknesse.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- Letter from May 21st [1886]
- Letter from 25th August [1882]
- Letter from June 6 th [1882]
- Letter from July 17th 1879
- Letter from July 25th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
